remarks: MINT CONDITION - MOVE-IN READY! Tastefully updated garden style condo at Beachcomber. Newer neutral paint, gleaming hardwood floors. Updated kitchen with plenty of cabinets (only 1 year old granite countertop & subway tile backsplash). Spacious open living room dining area combo, crown moldings throughout, updated bath, replaced raised panel doors throughout, laundry room in basement and large storage area, one reserved parking space (photos shown are taken prior to current tenant moving in a year ago, unit will look the same once vacated). New flooring in hallways in process of being installed and hallways will be repaiinted inthe near future. Great Cove location across the street from Chelsea Piers and within short walking distance to popular COVE Island Park and Cummings Beach. NO PETS! Excellent credit and references a must. AGENTS PLEASE READ AGENT REMARKS REGARDING APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS! Listing agent is a co-owner.
